title: Solomon Domain Analysis Artifact
description: Structural specification for the domain_reasoner output (CONTRACT-016). This schema defines the expected shape of the pre_computed_domain_analysis object embedded in reasoning_trace per turn. It is NOT emitted as a standalone session artifact — domain analysis data is persisted inside interaction_trace.json under reasoning_trace.pre_computed_domain_analysis. Used as a structural reference by domain_reasoner.py and for IDE/documentation purposes only.

option_readiness.description: Domain reasoner determination. 'ready': at least one option is qualified, safe to present. 'deferred': domain constraints understood but material gaps prevent qualification now. 'blocked': safety veto, participation barrier, or fundamental information absence prevents option work.

readiness_rationale.description: Explicit reasoning behind the option_readiness determination.

safety_veto_applied.description: True when party_state.json signals caused option_readiness to be held at blocked regardless of domain feasibility.

safety_veto_reason.description: The specific party_state signal that triggered the veto. Non-null when safety_veto_applied is true.

qualified_candidates.description: Options the domain reasoner has assessed as feasible. Empty when option_readiness is not 'ready'.

blocking_constraints.description: Specific constraints preventing option release. Each entry includes what would resolve it.

material_gaps.description: Information gaps that affect the option_readiness determination.

domain_confidence.description: Domain reasoner confidence in its own assessment. 'low' on turn 1 or with insufficient party input.

domain_notes.description: Practitioner-level read of the session state. What a domain expert would observe about this specific situation right now.

feasibility_rationale.description: Why this option is viable given current session state.

conditions.description: Any conditions that must hold for this option to remain viable.

what_would_resolve_it.description: What needs to happen for this constraint to be removed.

what_it_blocks.description: Which options or readiness determination this gap affects.
